notes.sg-composite-material-concrete-and-cemen: This topic and fly ash/ground granulated blast-furnace slag are all components of cement, which is a type of composite material. Portland cement is a good representative label.
notes.sg-composite-material-fly-ash: This is a component of cement, which is a type of composite material. Portland cement is a good representative label.
notes.sg-composite-material-ground-granulated-: This is a component of cement, which is a type of composite material. Portland cement is a good representative label.
notes.sg-composite-material-selective-laser-me: This is a specific additive manufacturing process for metal powders. Metal powder is a more general and appropriate label.
notes.sg-composite-material-selective-laser-si: This is a specific additive manufacturing process for metal powders. Metal powder is a more general and appropriate label.
